subject: Re: Fwd: Miles and Cathy
body:
of course


----- Original Message ----
From: "DKIESQ@aol.com" <DKIESQ@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Tuesday, May 8, 2007 6:46:40 PM
Subject: Fwd: Miles and Cathy


May I tell Rich that this is ok?  Did you agree to pick up the extra expense?
 
Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: dkiesq@aol.com

See what's free at AOL.com. 
Greetings
 
Per our conversation, the following was agreed to by JE and myself and you will pass it onto Richard.
 
The initial quote for our tickets was $ 4350.00. However a cancellation by AA caused the ticket price to rise as we had to go on a different carrier. Net result was that the tickets cost $5223.20. I informed JE who said it was fine. I charged tickets to card and related the issue to Richard.
 
During the course of JE's last visit, he asked if we wanted to leave earlier. He said that if we could, he would carry all the costs for changes to tickets etc. An opportunity arose and JE agreed today to us leaving and carrying the costs, I have arranged for us to leave on Sunday. The ticket changes will be $1450.20 per person. This I will be charging to LSJ credit card tomorrow as I have to complete the purchase to retain the ticket changes.
 
Regards
 
Miles and Cathy



Mr Miles Alexander 
Little St James Island, 6100 Red Hook Qrts B3, St Thomas, USVI, USA. 00802-1348
Phone : 340-5139855, Fax : 340-7758108, Email : littlestjames@yahoo.com

Greetings
 
Per our conversation, the following was agreed to by JE and myself and you will pass it onto Richard.
 
The initial quote for our tickets was $ 4350.00. However a cancellation by AA caused the ticket price to rise as we had to go on a different carrier. Net result was that the tickets cost $5223.20. I informed JE who said it was fine. I charged tickets to card and related the issue to Richard.
 
During the course of JE's last visit, he asked if we wanted to leave earlier. He said that if we could, he would carry all the costs for changes to tickets etc. An opportunity arose and JE agreed today to us leaving and carrying the costs, I have arranged for us to leave on Sunday. The ticket changes will be $1450.20 per person. This I will be charging to LSJ credit card tomorrow as I have to complete the purchase to retain the ticket changes.
 
Regards
